description: Style Note This summer we bring to you a pair of sandals from barbie that your little princess will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive printed patch and cut-out detailing on the upper, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day. Product Details Pink sandals with attractive printed patch on upper Dark pink ankle straps with branding One piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Nubs on outsole Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of sandals from Barbie that your little princess will not want to take off!
